title: mycaranthes vanoverberghii
intro: Mycaranthes vanoverberghii, also known as the Van Overbergh's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mycaranthes vanoverberghii include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
